metadata.description: Name of the App Service Plan.

siteConfig.appSettings: [concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'CURRENT_STACK', 'value', 'dotnet'), createObject('name', 'WEBSITE_RUN_FROM_PACKAGE', 'value', variables('packageUrl'))), if(contains(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/config', parameters('webAppName'), 'appsettings'), '2025-05-01').properties, 'OVERRIDE_USE_MI_FIC_ASSERTION_CLIENTID'), createArray(createObject('name', 'OVERRIDE_USE_MI_FIC_ASSERTION_CLIENTID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/config', parameters('webAppName'), 'appsettings'), '2025-05-01').properties.OVERRIDE_USE_MI_FIC_ASSERTION_CLIENTID)), createArray()), if(contains(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/config', parameters('webAppName'), 'appsettings'), '2025-05-01').properties, 'WEBSITE_AUTH_AAD_ALLOWED_TENANTS'), createArray(createObject('name', 'WEBSITE_AUTH_AAD_ALLOWED_TENANTS', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/config', parameters('webAppName'), 'appsettings'), '2025-05-01').properties.WEBSITE_AUTH_AAD_ALLOWED_TENANTS)), createArray()), if(contains(reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/config', parameters('webAppName'), 'appsettings'), '2025-05-01').properties, 'WEBSITE_AUTH_PRM_DEFAULT_WITH_SCOPES'), createArray(createObject('name', 'WEBSITE_AUTH_PRM_DEFAULT_WITH_SCOPES', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites/config', parameters('webAppName'), 'appsettings'), '2025-05-01').properties.WEBSITE_AUTH_PRM_DEFAULT_WITH_SCOPES)), createArray()))]
